headline: Nancy Guthrie's Kidnap Ransom Note 💀💸 Claims Death 😵‍💫 Apology to Fam 🤷‍♂️
text: Nancy Guthrie 💃👵 got SNATCHED 🦹‍♂️ from her Tucson 🏜️ crib on 31 January after fam dropped her off 🏠🚗. The next day a RANSOM NOTE 💌📨 demanding MILLIONS in BITCOIN 🪙💰 lands like a BOSS, spilling TEA ☕ about her bedroom and backyard 🌵🛏️. Then BOOM 💥 on 6 February, NOTE #2 hits 📬 saying she DIED 😭 and they didn't MEAN IT, with a SORRY NOTE to the fam like a bad breakup text 💔🙏. Savannah Guthrie 🎤👩‍💼 from NBC TODAY 📰 gets the bad vibes, begs the KIDNAPPERS 🦹‍♂️ to RETURN MOMMA 🧓 while offering $1M 💵 reward plus FBI $100K 🏆. Pima County Sheriffs 🛡️ and FBI 🕵️‍♂️ are still HUNTING leads, masked dude caught on CCTV 🎥🕴️. Sav stepped away from the SHOW 📺 for MONTHS, came back in APRIL 🗓️ still HOPING against HOPE. Notes had insider INFO about the house so this ain't no FAKE NEWS 📰❌, but some later notes might be BOGUS. Apology note says it was INADVERTENT like whoopsie daisy death 🤦‍♂️. The whole saga is a CRIME DRAMA 🎭 with BITCOIN demands, family PLEAS and ongoing INVESTIGATION that still SLAPS active 💪🔍.
